log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Halfling — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Halfling — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Halfling — Bardic Musician.
→ Halfling — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 20] FAIL! 33 necrotic damage. HP: 34/67

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Halfling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
